## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.11.1

### 📷 Cameras
- Improves AI-plan MQTT event routing so camera notification events can be matched even when the camera identifier is nested inside the event payload.
- Preserves the APK-reported camera motion sensitivity value instead of replacing `0` with a different default.
- Adds `0` as a valid camera motion sensitivity select option when the app reports it.

### 🐛 Fixes
- Fixes a case where camera motion or AI detection events could be received but not applied to the camera entity, leaving the Home Assistant event entity at `unknown`.
- Adds redacted MQTT event routing debug context for routed and unrouted X-Sense events.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for nested AI-plan camera event routing and APK camera motion sensitivity values.
